title: Remove >=llvm-core/libclc-22 mask — workaround may no longer be needed
body_lines: The `>=llvm-core/libclc-22` mask in `package.mask/00-binhost` was added because
`dev-util/mesa_clc` required `=llvm-core/libclc-21*`.
The latest ebuilds **no longer appear to have this constraint**.
Please verify and remove:
- `>=llvm-core/libclc-22` from `package.mask/00-binhost`
- `llvm_slot_21` USE flag from `package.use/00-profile-defaults` (`llvm-core/libclc` line)

title: Remove pipewire -ffmpeg workaround — USE flag may no longer exist
body_lines: The `-ffmpeg` USE flag on `media-video/pipewire` in `package.use/00-profile-defaults`
was added to break: `ffmpeg → openal[sdl] → libsdl2[pipewire] → pipewire[ffmpeg]`.
`media-video/pipewire` **no longer appears to have an `ffmpeg` USE flag**.
Please verify and remove `-ffmpeg` from the `media-video/pipewire` line.

title: Remove openal -pipewire workaround — USE flag may no longer exist
body_lines: The `-pipewire` USE flag on `media-libs/openal` in `package.use/00-profile-defaults`
was added to break: `ffmpeg → openal → pipewire → ffmpeg`.
`media-libs/openal` **no longer appears to have a `pipewire` USE flag**.
Please verify and remove `-pipewire` from the `media-libs/openal` line.

title: Remove pillow -truetype workaround — USE flag may no longer exist
body_lines: The `-truetype` USE flag on `dev-python/pillow` in `package.use/00-profile-defaults`
was added to break: `glib → docutils → pillow[truetype] → harfbuzz → glib`.
`dev-python/pillow` **no longer appears to have a `truetype` USE flag**.
Please verify and remove `-truetype` from the `dev-python/pillow` line.

title: Remove python:3.12 -bluetooth workaround — USE flag may no longer exist
body_lines: The `-bluetooth` USE flag on `dev-lang/python:3.12` in `package.use/00-profile-defaults`
was added to break: `docutils → python-3.12[bluetooth] → bluez → glib → docutils`.
`dev-lang/python` **no longer appears to have a `bluetooth` USE flag**.
Please verify and remove the `dev-lang/python:3.12 -bluetooth` line.

title: Remove musescore -jack workaround — REQUIRED_USE constraint may no longer exist
body_lines: The `-jack` USE flag on `media-sound/musescore` in `package.use/00-profile-defaults`
was added because musescore has `REQUIRED_USE: at-most-one-of ( jack pipewire )`
and both flags are globally enabled in `make.conf`.
`media-sound/musescore` **no longer appears to have the `at-most-one-of ( jack pipewire )` constraint**.
Please verify and remove the `media-sound/musescore -jack` line.

title: Remove faac MPEG-4 license workaround — dependency may no longer exist
body_lines: The MPEG-4 license acceptance for `media-libs/faac` in `package.license/00-binhost`
was added because `media-libs/avidemux-plugins[aac]` depends on `media-libs/faac`,
which is masked by the MPEG-4 license under `ACCEPT_LICENSE="-* @FREE @BINARY-REDISTRIBUTABLE"`.
`media-libs/avidemux-plugins` **no longer appears to depend on `media-libs/faac`**.
Please verify and remove the `media-libs/faac MPEG-4` line from `package.license/00-binhost`.

title: Remove =dev-build/cmake-4.3.1 mask — a newer cmake version is now available
body_lines: The `=dev-build/cmake-4.3.1` mask in `package.mask/00-binhost` was added because
cmake-4.3.1 failed to build in two consecutive CI attempts (phase: unknown).
A newer cmake version is now available in the portage tree, so the mask on the
specific 4.3.1 ebuild is no longer needed — portage will prefer the newer version.
Please verify and remove the `=dev-build/cmake-4.3.1` line from `package.mask/00-binhost`.
